---
title: "Research topic"
output: html_document
---

# DS2020: Final Project

Members: Samara Feldhacker (samara28), Alina Kirkpatrick (alinayjk)

### Data Desccription

- What dataset you are using (include a link if applicable)
- Initial data cleaning steps you anticipate
- Basic/marginal summaries you have explored or plan to explore


### Project idea / research questions:
- What are you trying to investigate?
- What analyses or visualizations do you expect to use?
